goal: Review a bounded research brief plus prefetched evidence, then produce a concise decision summary through the ai-company flow.
strategy: Prepare a compact evidence packet first, then dispatch one bounded summary job so the child worker never needs broad repo context or live browsing.

jobs.title: Write final research summary
jobs.instruction: Write summary.md as concise markdown only. Use exactly 3 short bullet points and then 1 short takeaway sentence. Mention migration risk, pilot metrics, and rollback readiness. Explicitly mention the shift from 95 minutes to 28 minutes and from 14 per week to 5 per week. Use the words migration, pilot, rollback, and uncertainty. Keep the total output under 120 words and do not add an intro or outro.
jobs.success_check: summary.md concisely summarizes the supplied evidence with explicit decision guidance.
